query: SELECT c.id as course_id, l.id as lesson_id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions WHERE lessonId = l.id) as quiz_count FROM courses c JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code = 'THE201' ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id as course_id, l.id as lesson_id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions WHERE lessonId = l.id) as quiz_count FROM courses c JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code = 'THE201' ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
